Operation 'getCommandStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. However, description is completely empty, which severely impacts AI agent interpretability. Added explanation of what the operation does, what it returns (Command object with status details), and when an AI agent should use this operation (monitoring execution progress).

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of a submitted command identified by commandId. Returns a Command object containing status information (e.g., running, completed, failed), execution details, and metadata. Use this operation to monitor command execution progress and determine when results are available.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. However, description is completely empty, which severely impacts AI agent interpretability. Added explanation of what the operation does, what it returns (Command object with status details), and when an AI agent should use this operation (monitoring execution progress).

message: Operation 'getCommandResults' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_input_details. Summary is clear but description is empty. Added details about what the operation returns (CommandResults object), clarified that it requires a completed command, explained the optional parameters support pagination/filtering, and provided guidance on when to use this operation in relation to getCommandStatus.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the results of a completed command identified by commandId. Supports pagination and filtering through optional parameters. Returns a CommandResults object containing the query output data. Only available after the command has completed successfully. Use this operation to fetch query results after verifying command status.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is empty. Added details about what the operation returns (CommandResults object), clarified that it requires a completed command, explained the optional parameters support pagination/filtering, and provided guidance on when to use this operation in relation to getCommandStatus.

message: Operation 'cancelCommand' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is empty, missing critical information about side effects and state changes. Added details about which command states can be cancelled, what is returned, explicit side effects (resource release, execution stop), and important constraint that cancellation is irreversible for AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Cancels a running command identified by commandId. Only applicable to commands in running or queued state. Returns the updated Command object with status changed to cancelled. Side effects: stops command execution, releases allocated resources, and prevents result generation. Cannot be reversed once executed.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is empty, missing critical information about side effects and state changes. Added details about which command states can be cancelled, what is returned, explicit side effects (resource release, execution stop), and important constraint that cancellation is irreversible for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteCluster' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing description entirely. data.description_suggestion: Deletes a cluster and all associated resources. Requires the cluster ID as a path parameter. This operation is irreversible and will terminate all running jobs on the cluster. Returns a confirmation response. Requires API token authentication.

data.description_suggestion: Manages the operational state of a cluster by starting or terminating it. Requires cluster ID and action parameter (e.g., 'start' or 'terminate'). Returns the updated Cluster object with new status. Starting a cluster may take several minutes to become operational. Terminating a cluster will stop all running jobs. Requires API token authentication.

data.current_summary: Submit a command (Hive, Presto, Spark, etc.)
data.description_suggestion: Submits a command for execution on a Qubole cluster. Accepts a CommandSubmitRequest specifying the command type (Hive, Presto, Spark, etc.), SQL or code content, and target cluster. Returns a Command object with assigned command ID and initial status. The command will be queued and executed asynchronously. Results can be retrieved using the command ID. Requires API token authentication.

Added details about request schema expectations, supported command types, return value (Command object with ID), asynchronous execution model, how to retrieve results, and authentication to enable AI agents to understand the full command submission workflow.
